## coa brain lint

Validate brain structure and add missing headers

### Synopsis

Scan the brain.d directory, verify YAML syntax, and ensure every file has the correct functional header.

```
coa brain lint [flags]
```

### Examples

```
  # Validate and annotate all brain files
  coa brain lint
```

